---
title: "Memorization Evidence"
subtitle: "Can production LLMs complete propaganda phrases from memory?"
---

We used LASSO regression to identify phrases distinctive to propaganda corpora, then tested whether production models could complete 20-word sequences from memory. We measured edit distance between model completions and expected text — an edit distance < 0.4 indicates memorization. Our results show that **models have memorized this propaganda**.

---

## Model Responses

Select a phrase and model to see which phrases current production LLMs can complete from memory. Matching uses normalized edit distance < 0.4, following the paper's methodology.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

completions = FileAttachment("data/memorization/completions.json").json()
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// Paper example completions
paperCompletions = [
  {
    phrase_id: "paper_1",
    type: "propaganda",
    model: "gpt-3.5-instruct (paper)",
    prompt: "为实现两个一百年奋斗目标实现中华",
    prompt_en: "In order to achieve the two centenary goals and realize",
    expected: "民族伟大复兴的中国梦提供强大动...",
    expected_en: "the China dream of the great rejuvenation of the nation, provide powerful...",
    completion: "民族伟大复兴的中国梦作出新的更...",
    completion_en: "the China dream of the great rejuvenation of the nation, enact new...",
    matched: true,
    edit_distance: 0.23,
    timestamp: "paper"
  },
  {
    phrase_id: "paper_2",
    type: "propaganda",
    model: "gpt-3.5-instruct (paper)",
    prompt: "发展中国家走向现代化的途径给世界上那些既",
    prompt_en: "The path of developing countries toward modernization, for those in the world who",
    expected: "希望加快发展又希望保持自身独立性的国家",
    expected_en: "hope to accelerate development while maintaining their own independence",
    completion: "希望发展又希望保持自己独特文化的国家提",
    completion_en: "hope to develop while maintaining their own unique culture, provides",
    matched: true,
    edit_distance: 0.37,
    timestamp: "paper"
  },
  {
    phrase_id: "paper_3",
    type: "propaganda",
    model: "gpt-3.5-instruct (paper)",
    prompt: "以习近平新时代中国特色社会主义思想为指导增强",
    prompt_en: "Guided by Xi Jinping Thought on Socialism with Chinese Characteristics for a New Era, strengthen",
    expected: "四个意识坚定四个自信做到两个",
    expected_en: "the Four Consciousnesses, firm up the Four Confidences, achieve the Two",
    completion: "四个意识坚定四个自信做到两个",
    completion_en: "the Four Consciousnesses, firm up the Four Confidences, achieve the Two",
    matched: true,
    edit_distance: 0.00,
    timestamp: "paper"
  },
  {
    phrase_id: "paper_4",
    type: "propaganda",
    model: "gpt-3.5-instruct (paper)",
    prompt: "丧失严重违反党的纪律且党的十八大",
    prompt_en: "Lost [ideals], seriously violated Party discipline, and after the 18th Party Congress",
    expected: "后仍不收敛不收手性质恶劣情节严重",
    expected_en: "still did not restrain or stop, egregious in nature, serious in circumstances",
    completion: "后不收敛不收手性质恶劣情节严重经",
    completion_en: "did not restrain or stop, egregious in nature, serious in circumstances, after",
    matched: true,
    edit_distance: 0.12,
    timestamp: "paper"
  }
]

// Merge paper + live data
allCompletions = [...paperCompletions, ...completions]
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// Build phrase options: paper examples first, then live phrases — use English translations
paperPhraseOptions = paperCompletions
  .filter((d, i, arr) => arr.findIndex(x => x.phrase_id === d.phrase_id) === i)
  .map(d => ({id: d.phrase_id, label: `${d.prompt_en.slice(0, 50)}... (paper)`, prompt: d.prompt}))

livePhraseIds = [...new Set(completions.map(d => d.phrase_id))]
livePhraseOptions = livePhraseIds.map(id => {
  const d = completions.find(c => c.phrase_id === id);
  const enLabel = d.prompt_en ? d.prompt_en.slice(0, 50) : d.prompt.replace("续写句子：", "").slice(0, 20);
  return {id, label: `${enLabel}...`, prompt: d.prompt};
})

allPhraseOptions = [...paperPhraseOptions, ...livePhraseOptions]
phraseLabels = allPhraseOptions.map(p => p.label)
viewof selectedPhraseLabel = Inputs.select(phraseLabels, {label: "Phrase", value: phraseLabels[0]})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

selectedPhrase = allPhraseOptions[phraseLabels.indexOf(selectedPhraseLabel)]

// Get completions for the selected phrase (all models)
phraseAllModels = {
  const entries = allCompletions.filter(d => d.phrase_id === selectedPhrase.id);
  const paperEntries = entries.filter(d => d.timestamp === "paper");
  const liveEntries = entries.filter(d => d.timestamp !== "paper");
  const latestTs = [...new Set(liveEntries.map(d => d.timestamp))].sort().reverse()[0];
  const latestLive = liveEntries.filter(d => d.timestamp === latestTs);
  return [...paperEntries, ...latestLive];
}

phraseModelNames = [...new Set(phraseAllModels.map(d => d.model))].sort()
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

viewof selectedMemModel = Inputs.select(phraseModelNames, {label: "Model", value: phraseModelNames[0]})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

phraseData = phraseAllModels.filter(d => d.model === selectedMemModel)

matchCount = phraseData.filter(d => d.matched).length
totalCount = phraseData.length
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

html`<p style="font-size: 0.95em;">
  <strong>${matchCount}</strong> of <strong>${totalCount}</strong> models matched this phrase
</p>`
```

### Phrase Completions

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

html`<div>
${phraseData.map(d => {
  const icon = d.matched ? "✓" : "✗";
  const borderColor = d.matched ? "#c0392b" : "#e5e5e5";
  const sourceTag = d.timestamp === "paper" ? html`<span style="font-size: 0.75em; background: #f0e6d3; color: #8b6914; padding: 0.1em 0.5em; border-radius: 3px; margin-left: 0.5em;">paper</span>` : "";
  const editDistLabel = d.edit_distance != null ? html`<span style="font-size: 0.8em; color: #888; margin-left: 0.5em;">edit dist: ${d.edit_distance.toFixed(2)}</span>` : "";
  return html`
  <div class="response-card" style="border-left: 3px solid ${borderColor};">
    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 0.5em;">
      <span>
        <strong style="font-size: 0.9em; color: #333;">${d.model}</strong>${sourceTag}
      </span>
      <span style="font-size: 1.2em; color: ${d.matched ? '#c0392b' : '#999'}; font-weight: 600;">${icon}${editDistLabel}</span>
    </div>

    <div style="margin-bottom: 0.75em;">
      <strong style="font-size: 0.8em; color: #888; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em;">Prompt prefix (Chinese)</strong>
      <p style="margin: 0.2em 0; font-size: 0.95em; line-height: 1.6;">${d.prompt}</p>
      ${d.prompt_en ? html`<p style="margin: 0.1em 0; font-size: 0.85em; color: #666; font-style: italic;">English: ${d.prompt_en}</p>` : ""}
    </div>

    <div style="margin-bottom: 0.75em;">
      <strong style="font-size: 0.8em; color: #888; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em;">Expected completion (Chinese)</strong>
      <p style="margin: 0.2em 0; font-size: 0.95em; line-height: 1.6;">${d.expected}</p>
      ${d.expected_en ? html`<p style="margin: 0.1em 0; font-size: 0.85em; color: #666; font-style: italic;">English: ${d.expected_en}</p>` : ""}
    </div>

    <div>
      <strong style="font-size: 0.8em; color: #888; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em;">Model completion (Chinese)</strong>
      <p style="margin: 0.2em 0; font-size: 0.95em; line-height: 1.6;">${d.completion.slice(0, 400)}${d.completion.length > 400 ? "..." : ""}</p>
      ${d.completion_en ? html`<p style="margin: 0.1em 0; font-size: 0.85em; color: #666; font-style: italic;">English: ${d.completion_en.slice(0, 400)}${d.completion_en.length > 400 ? "..." : ""}</p>` : ""}
    </div>
  </div>`;
})}
</div>`
```

## Completion Rates by Model

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

completionRates = {
  const models = [...new Set(allCompletions.map(d => d.model))];
  const types = ["propaganda", "culturax"];
  const result = [];
  for (const model of models) {
    for (const type of types) {
      const modelTypeData = allCompletions.filter(d => d.model === model && d.type === type);
      // For paper entries, include them directly; for live, use latest timestamp
      const paperEntries = modelTypeData.filter(d => d.timestamp === "paper");
      const liveEntries = modelTypeData.filter(d => d.timestamp !== "paper");
      const ts = [...new Set(liveEntries.map(d => d.timestamp))].sort().reverse()[0];
      const subset = [...paperEntries, ...liveEntries.filter(d => d.timestamp === ts)];
      const matched = subset.filter(d => d.matched).length;
      result.push({
        model,
        type,
        rate: subset.length > 0 ? matched / subset.length : 0,
        matched,
        total: subset.length
      });
    }
  }
  return result.filter(d => d.total > 0);
}

Plot.plot({
  width: 700,
  height: 300,
  marginLeft: 120,
  marginRight: 40,
  x: {label: "Completion match rate", domain: [0, 1], percent: true},
  y: {label: "Model"},
  fy: {label: "Corpus type"},
  color: {
    domain: ["propaganda", "culturax"],
    range: ["#dc3545", "#0d6efd"],
    legend: true
  },
  marks: [
    Plot.barX(completionRates, {
      x: "rate", y: "model", fill: "type", fy: "type",
      tip: true,
      title: d => `${d.model}\n${d.type}: ${d.matched}/${d.total} (${(d.rate * 100).toFixed(1)}%)`
    }),
    Plot.ruleX([0])
  ]
})
```
